## Acceptance Checklist

- [ ] Changes are in the correct owner directory.
- [ ] README or docs updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] API changes are recorded in `docs/api_design.md`.
- [ ] Interface, field, response, or cross-module data changes are recorded in `docs/module_contracts.md`.
- [ ] API responses still follow `{ success, data, message, error_code }`.
- [ ] No unrelated files are changed.
- [ ] Evidence is attached for acceptance.
